ValidationRule.description: Only one Invoice in Status Draft
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, RecordType.DeveloperName ="Invoice", ISPICKVAL( InvoiceStatus__c, "Draft"), ProjectName__r.ValCountHasInvoiceDraft__c =1, OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(InvoiceStatus__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: There is already an Invoice in Status "Draft". Please complete this invoice first. (IN012)
